results.rendered_html: prage adv. früh morgens  P. 4,3,23 .  AK. 3,5,19 .  H. 1533 .  HALĀY. 1,111 .  LĀṬY. 8,3,1 . sāyaṃ snāyātprage tathā  M. 6,6 .  KATHĀS. 43,34 .  ŚIŚ. 12,1 . ati˚  M. 4,62 . Der Form nach loc. von praga, welches die hervorschreitende Sonne bezeichnen könnte.

results.rendered_html:
prage ind. Early in the morning, at day-break; itthaṃ rathāśvebhāniṣādināṃ prage gaṇo nṛpāṇāmatha toraṇādbahiḥ  Śi. 12. 1 ; sāyaṃ snāyātprage tathā  Ms. 6. 6 ; 4. 62. 
Comp.
— tana a. to be performed in the morning.
— niśa-śaya a. who is asleep at day-break.
